summary: The user inquired about benefits available to adjunct professors, specifically health insurance and retirement plans, and expressed the importance of understanding these before accepting a job. The session included advice on finding the right university and tips for standing out during the adjunct teaching application process.
facts: The user plans to check with the university about benefits before accepting any adjunct teaching job. The user is concerned about having access to health insurance and retirement plans as an adjunct professor. The user is seeking adjunct teaching positions and is looking for advice on the application process. The user is interested in tips for finding the right university to work for. The user is considering tailoring each application to specific universities and departments. The user is advised to highlight relevant experience and skills in their cover letter and CV. The user is encouraged to include a teaching philosophy and examples of successful teaching experiences in their applications. The user is advised to provide relevant references who can speak to their teaching abilities.
